name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

In just two days, eleven Republican candidates will take the stage in Simi Valley, California for the second Republican presidential debate.

With debate moderators armed with gotcha questions and agendas, I'm not taking anything for granted. Not after I received only 5 minutes of speaking time during the last debate -- less than any other candidate!

That's why I'm counting on you to help me go around our national media and straight to Republican voters with your most generous support.

My campaign is now putting the finishing touches on a brand-new TV ad to air in key Republican primary states on Wednesday. **[But I'm counting on your support to help me put it on the air](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377703:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, this is a big week for my campaign, not only because of Wednesday's debate, but also because Thursday, September 17th, is Constitution Day.

On this date 226 years ago, our nation's Founders handed down the U.S. Constitution, a document designed to restrain the power of government.

Those limited government principles would end up making the United States the greatest and freest nation on earth.

Today, those principles are under assault.

Hardly a week goes by without assaults from the Obama administration on our most basic liberties.

And sadly, many in my Republican Party -- which has at least given lip service to Constitutional principles for the past several decades -- no longer even mouth support for liberty.

I'm sure our national media and Big Government special interests couldn't be happier to learn the current GOP leader in the polls virtually never uses the words "freedom" or "liberty" in any of his speeches or public statements!

No wonder our national media continues to pump up his candidacy while the Big Government establishment's handpicked candidate scrambles to translate his big dollars into voter support!

Fellow Conservative, I think freedom and liberty are too precious to let perish.

I think the American people will agree with me, if only I can cut through the media's roadblock.

**[That's why I'm counting on your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377703:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)**.

Your contribution will help me reach out and inform more voters about . . .

. . . My 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax Plan that will blow up the tax code, return $2 TRILLION to the American people and create 1.4 million new jobs in the process . . .

. . . My plan to impose term limits on career Washington, D.C. politicians and actually force Congress to read the bills they vote on are critical steps to actually reforming Congress . . .

. . . My Audit the Fed bill to finally expose corruption, cronyism and secrecy in our nation's out-of-control secret bank is critical to stopping never-ending boom-bust economic cycles that rob so many Americans blind . . .

. . . My pledges to repeal 100% of ObamaCare and protect the ENTIRE Bill of Rights are critical to ensuring every American the freedom and prosperity that should be their birthright . . .

. . . And my track-record of DELIVERING on the promises I make.

Fellow Conservative, we cannot allow career politicians and charlatans to get away with trashing the principles that have made America so great.

We have to fight back.

**[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY to help me go around the media and put my campaign's TV ad on the air](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377703:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377704:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377705:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377706:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377707:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377703:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377708:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377709:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30377710:29098463664:m:1:879035888:621F4DEBC75360E870C943C58710CD3C:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isGW51WmlN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osGW51WmlN)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osGW51WmlN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-29098463664-echo3-78D7932EB448977CB058663B04E4A1F9@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Ken McKay
subject: FW: Debate prep question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter: Did you see this note from Governor Christie last week?
The debate is on Wednesday and we still need your feedback as we continue our debate prep.****
**[Can you take a moment and fill out this quick debate survey?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43901841:19292820728:m:1:1516426255:C02F4252AD3F6C9EF5487648EC84AE97:r)** If you do, and make a quick donation of $5 or more, we'll send you an official campaign bumper sticker.
Thanks and don't forget to tune in to the debate on Wednesday on CNN at 8 p.m. ET.
Ken
\----------Forwarded Message----------
From: Chris Christie <info@chrischristie.com>
Date: Thu, Sep 10, 2015
Subject: Debate prep question for you
To: Ken McKay
Ken - The next debate is less than a week away. As I prepare to talk about my thoughts and ideas for getting this country back on track, I'm aware that a number of very important issues didn't get the air time they deserved during the first debate.

Which is why I'm asking for your help. **[Let me know which issues you think should get more air time during the second debate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43901841:19292820728:m:1:1516426255:C02F4252AD3F6C9EF5487648EC84AE97:r)** My entire campaign has been about listening and understanding what concerns Americans most. Hearing from you first-hand always makes me better as a candidate and stronger as a leader.
> So, whether I get to talk about them when answering a question, or in my closing remarks, I want your feedback on the issues you want me to address.
>
Then, tune in to watch on debate night and follow along on social media. Today, it's about debate prep but **[I hope you'll continue to let me know which issues are important to you so we can continue to talk about real solutions.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43901841:19292820728:m:1:1516426255:C02F4252AD3F6C9EF5487648EC84AE97:r)** I would greatly appreciate your feedback.
Chris
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser [**here**](https://email.vervemail.com/p/v6OPpRRp1N).

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
**You can unsubscribe instantly[here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6OPpRRp1N)**.
| |

name: Team Marco
subject: Vote for your favorite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

We're putting together our
next digital ad, and we want your help figuring out what it
should look like.

We have some cool footage
of Marco driving around his hometown of Miami, talking about a
few issues important to him: the value of the American Dream,
what's driving him on the campaign trail, and more.

Click here to vote for your
favorite by donating $5 - the winner will go in Marco's next ad.

The videos are great. Go
watch all five now, and then let us know which one we should use.

Thanks as always for your
support,

Team Marco

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Rand Paul
subject: 226 years ago...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Circle this date on your calendar.

On September 17th, my campaign and the grassroots will be holding a Constitution Day Money Bomb.

Will you pledge to stand with me and make this Money Bomb a massive success by donating on Thursday at **[https://randpaul.com/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30385302:29106076745:m:1:879035888:78CD934F46F5252EE63155C736B03579:r)**?

226 years ago, our Founders gathered in Philadelphia and created a document unlike any other.

Our Constitution outlined checks and balances and separation of powers that restrained the power of the federal government.

America became the freest and most prosperous nation on earth because our Founders valued liberty over centralized authority.

That was the birth of American exceptionalism.

Over time, there has been a push and pull between those who seek to trample our liberties at the expense of their own ambitions and those who stand up to defend our founding values.

Fellow Conservative, when you scan the recent headlines it feels like our freedom and liberty have never been under greater assault.

But this election gives our party a chance to offer a course correction.

Hillary Clinton's campaign is being dragged down under the weight of scandal, and grassroots conservatives have an opportunity to nominate a candidate who champions our values.

I ran for office because I was fed up with throwing things at the TV as career politicians bailed out the banks, rammed ObamaCare into law and attacked the Bill of Rights.

And I'm in this race because our nation needs a President who understands as Ronald Reagan did, that freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.

That's why I've taken bold stands to defeat the Washington Machine by:

>> Filibustering for ten-and-a-half hours to force illegal NSA spying to expire.

>> Proposing the largest tax cut in American history with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax plan to return over $2 trillion to the pockets of everyday Americans by having everyone paying the same low rate.

>> Auditing the Federal Reserve and tearing down the cloak of secrecy that allows our central bank to enable the endless print-borrow-and-spend cycle that plunged our nation $19 trillion in debt.

>> Repealing ObamaCare 100% and wiping this job-killing scheme off the books for good.

But to get this agenda past the media gatekeepers who are working to silence my message, I need your help to make the Constitution Day Money Bomb a massive success.

There are just over 72 hours until the launch of this money bomb and it's vital I count on the support of patriots everywhere.

So please visit my website https://randpaul.com/ and chip in your most generous contribution on September 17th.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30385303:29106076745:m:1:879035888:78CD934F46F5252EE63155C736B03579:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30385304:29106076745:m:1:879035888:78CD934F46F5252EE63155C736B03579:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30385305:29106076745:m:1:879035888:78CD934F46F5252EE63155C736B03579:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Take Action: Oppose Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **I 'm under attack for opposing _Citizens United._**

No, you didn't read that wrong. The Koch-backed group Americans for Prosperity (AFP) just launched an attack against me last week for **OPPOSING** _Citizens United_.

I need your help to fight back. [_**Will you stand with me right now to show the Kochs that they won 't get away with this ridiculous attack?**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e1/738133e4/3af7d2d5/7f8bc702/260429200/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150914m")

The Op-Ed they published against me is wrong on the substance and tries to paint my position as something it isn't.

These groups will do anything to protect _Citizens United_. And they'll spend anything to defeat people like me, who are dedicated to overturning it.

I need your help **_immediately_** if I want to fight back with the truth. We need to show the Kochs that we won't just back down in the face of their lies.

[**I need 2,000 supporters to stand with me RIGHT NOW. Will you add your name to end _Citizens United_?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e1/738133e4/3af7d2d5/7f8bc702/260429200/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150914m")

I oppose _Citizens United_. I want to see the effects of _Citizens United_ ended, once and for all.

And I'm not alone, either. I have you. You are the only thing stopping the Kochs and groups like AFP from buying yet another election.

Friend -- if you're with me, say so. [_**Sign the petition to call for an end to _Citizens United._**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e1/738133e4/3af7d2d5/7f8bc702/260429200/VEsF/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150914m")

Thanks for your help.

Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e1/738133e4/3af7d2d5/7f8bc703/260429200/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e1/738133e4/3af7d2d5/7f8bf8fc/260429200/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Come to the first debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me in Las Vegas? | Friend --

When I take the stage at the first Democratic presidential primary debate next month, I'd love to know you're with me -- and I can't think of a better way to do that than having you right there in the audience.

**[If you add your name today, you'll be entered for the chance to be flown out with a guest to Las Vegas to meet me and watch the debate live in person.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We're only a few weeks from the debate, and I'm excited to get out there and talk about our ideas and what we stand for as a party. It's going to be an important moment. I hope you'll be a part of it.

The campaign will take care of your travel, accommodations, and your tickets to the event. The only thing you're responsible for is cheering loudly!

**Add your name right now for the chance to come to the first debate and meet me:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

\- H

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM1MDQ3NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNDQxOTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Will you join me in Las Vegas? | Friend -- When I take the stage at the first Democratic presidential primary debate next month, I'd love to know you're with me -- and I can't think of a better way to do that than having you right there in the audience. We're only a few weeks from the debate, and I'm excited to get out there and talk about our ideas and what we stand for as a party. It's going to be an important moment. I hope you'll be a part of it. The campaign will take care of your travel, accommodations, and your tickets to the event. The only thing you're responsible for is cheering loudly! Add your name right now for the chance to come to the first debate and meet me: \- H | No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing or click to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
